matches.x: A Song [or] Psalm of David. O God, my heart is fixed; I will sing and give praise, even with my glory.
TO the chief Musician, Altaschith, A Psalm [or] Song of Asaph. Unto thee, O God, do we give thanks, [unto thee] do we give thanks: for [that] thy name is near thy wondrous works declare.
A Psalm. O sing unto the LORD a new song; for he hath done marvellous things: his right hand, and his holy arm, hath gotten him the victory.

PSALM XC. ° = Gods goodness portrayed. A Psalm. or Song for the sabbath day. T. isa good..thing to give thanks unto the Lord, and to sing praises unto thy name, 0 Most High; : 2 To show forth thy loving-kindness

In one of the very wise statements of the Old Testament, it is said: "It is a good thing to give thanks unto the Lord, and to sing praises unto thy name, O most High." (Psalm 92:1.) There are a great many reasons why that is a good idea. By being grateful we develop within ourselves those qualities of greatness. The best way to give life to such virtues as courage, love, happiness, prayer, faith,…
Sing unto the LORD a new song, [and] his praise from the end of the earth, ye that go down to the sea, and all that is therein; the isles, and the inhabitants thereof.
A Song [or] Psalm of David. O God, my heart is fixed; I will sing and give praise, even with my glory.
PRAISE ye the LORD. Sing unto the LORD a new song, [and] his praise in the congregation of saints.

matches.x: [103] “This Jubal,” he says, “is a father who invented psaltery and harp” (Gen. 4:21). Most appropriately does he give to sounding speech the title of father of music and of all musical instruments.
